texto: Properly understood, then, the scriptures counsel us to be virtuous not because romantic love is bad, but precisely because romantic love is so good. It is not only good; it is pure, precious, even sacred and holy.
explicacao: Citação de Bruce C. Hafen sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Properly understood, then, the scriptures counsel us to be virtuous not because romantic love is …” articula amor, love, romantic em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como romantic.
